actions.value: Edge is a zero-knowledge app and we don't have access to the information you share with our partners. Please reach out directly to MoonPay support to update your personal information: https://support.moonpay.com/hc/en-gb/requests/new

Edge is a zero-knowledge app and we don't have access to the information you share with our partners. Please reach out directly to MoonPay support to update your personal information: https://support.moonpay.com/hc/en-gb/requests/new
